indicators.name: no flat personal work surface
indicators.rationale: The absence of a flat surface at sitting height makes it impossible to set up a computer workstation.

indicators.name: upholstered chair without desk
indicators.rationale: The chair is designed for comfort rather than productivity, making it unsuitable for extended computer use.

indicators.name: high-traffic public layout
indicators.rationale: The layout of the room is designed for social interaction rather than focused work, making it unsuitable for solo computer work.

indicators.name: ambient lighting
indicators.rationale: Ambient lighting does not provide sufficient task illumination for screen work and may cause screen glare.

reasoning_summary: This indoor scene is fundamentally unsuitable for focused solo computer work. The lack of any desk surface, combined with the high-traffic public layout and ambient-only lighting, prevents productive workstation setup. A laptop could technically be balanced on one's lap on the chair, but the environment is far from adequate for sustained work.
